# platformImportDefinitions

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformImportDefinitions mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.platformImportDefinitions({ input: { graphId: '<UUID>', sourceScopeId: '<UUID>', sourceCommitId: '<UUID>', contexts: '<String>' } }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run platformImportDefinitions

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.platformImportDefinitions({ input: { graphId: '<UUID>', sourceScopeId: '<UUID>', sourceCommitId: '<UUID>', contexts: '<String>' } }).execute();
```
